title: Proclamation No. 339, s. 2000
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 339

DECLARING TUESDAY, JULY 11, 2000, AS A SPECIAL DAY IN THE CITY OF VALENZUELA

WHEREAS, Tuesday, July 11, 2000, marks the 131 st birth anniversary of the City’s most illustrious son, the late Dr. Pio Valenzuela;

WHEREAS, it is fitting and proper that the people of the City of Valenzuela, be given full opportunity to celebrate this event with appropriate ceremonies;

NOW, THEREFORE, I, JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA, President of the Philippines, by virtue of the powers vested in me in Book I, Chapter 7, Section 27, of the Administrative Code of 1987, do hereby declare Tuesday, July 11, 2000, as a special day in the City of Valenzuela.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 7 Th day of July, in the year of Our Lord, two thousand.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA

By the President: (Sgd.) RONALDO B. ZAMORA Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
